sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt8, value UInt8, str_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM (SELECT emptyArrayUInt8() AS empty_array) AS inner WHERE arrayLength(empty_array) = 0);
SELECT count() FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS(SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value = 1) AND value IN (SELECT arrayJoin(emptyArrayUInt8()));
SELECT id, value, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE str_value IS NULL) AS has_nulls FROM test_table GROUP BY id, value HAVING has_nulls = 1;
SELECT id, str_value, EXISTS(SELECT * FROM numbers(10) WHERE number > toUInt8(if(str_value IS NULL, 0, 2))) AS exists_case FROM test_table WHERE id = 3;
SELECT (SELECT EXISTS(SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 5)) AS result, emptyArrayUInt8() AS empty_array WHERE result = 0;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value, str_value FROM test_table WHERE value > 3) AS subquery WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery_exists;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (id UInt8, empty_array_array Array(UInt8)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, EXISTS(SELECT emptyArrayUInt8() WHERE arrayLength(empty_array_array) < 1) AS empty_check FROM edge_cases;
SELECT count() FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS(SELECT str_value FROM edge_cases WHERE id = 2 AND EXISTS(SELECT value FROM test_table));
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM numbers(10) WHERE number >= 9) AS exists_check, emptyArrayUInt8() AS empty_array WHERE exists_check = 1;
